auth_notes: Requires an X-API-Key or Authorization header. Some implementations utilize a Venue-ID or Account-ID header in conjunction with the secret key.
rate_limits: Typically 60 to 100 requests per minute depending on the subscription tier.
gotchas: Webhook payloads may require manual HMAC verification to ensure authenticity.
Date-time formats are often strictly ISO 8601 and sensitive to timezone offsets.
Rate limits are aggressive on trial or lower-tier accounts, requiring robust error handling in n8n.
research_notes: Integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured via 'Header Auth' in n8n credentials. For webhooks, a standard Webhook node is required, but the user must manually map the incoming JSON body as the provider does not have a pre-defined schema in n8n.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured via 'Header Auth' in n8n credentials. For webhooks, a standard Webhook node is required, but the user must manually map the incoming JSON body as the provider does not have a pre-defined schema in n8n.
